title: 4Pcs Strimmer Spool Line Compatible with Bosch ART 24 27 30 30-36 LI AdvancedGrassCut 36,1.6mm Standard Double Autofeed Nylon Replacement Spool for Bosch Trimmer Grass Trimmer F016800351
features: Compatibility: compatible with Bosch trimmer grass trimmer ART 30-36LI, AdvancedGrassCut36, ART 24, ART 27, ART 30, ART 24+, ART 27+, ART 30+, (models 2016 Onwards), replacement thread spool (F016800351), trimmer spool cover (16000). A000X601/1600A00DU0/F016L72438)
Premium quality: made with high-quality ABS spool and durable nylon thread. Not easy to break, supports fast cutting and longer service life, can cut weeds easily and efficiently.

High efficiency: The coil design reduces air resistance and cuts more efficiently, so you can reach the hard-to-reach edges of your garden lawn. The aerodynamic shape allows the wire to stretch and absorb shock on hard surfaces, providing less resistance for more efficient cuts.

Time saving: the automatic replacement of the coil feed system simplifies the tedious work of manually winding spools. Quick and easy replacement without tools. The 20 ft long trim line offers gardeners more space to trim.
Package size: you will receive 6 replacement bobbins that fit perfectly into the thread holes. Portable 1.65mm for fast cutting.

The aerodynamic shape reduces air resistance for more efficient cuts. You can work more efficiently. Easy to install The nylon replacement spool for grass trimmer is easy to install, not easy to break, supports fast cuts, can be cut and chopped quickly, and is also easy to store.
